reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The room and hotel were nice, but the staff and facilities to eat were below average.  Took 45 minutes to an hour to just get  a simple order out with very few guests in the bar/restaurant and they were out of almost everything on their menu.  No remote for the TV in the room as well.   Just seemed that there was little or no management providing oversight at the hotel to ensure basic service was up to par.
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Guestroom, Guest room, 2 Queen

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Staff was rude.  Bistro said they were open until 10 00.  They closed at 9 30 . We were hungry no food.  $ 34.00 for vender food.   No morning coffee in lobby.  $ 40.00 for breakfast.   All way overpriced.  Defiantly disappointed.
reviews.negatives: We will not stay here again.

reviews.title: Awesome hotel
reviews.text: Great hotel that is close to WSU.
reviews.response:
Thank you for choosing the Courtyard Pullman for your recent travels to Pullman. Commitment to service and guest satisfaction is a main focus and we are delighted to see you enjoyed your stay. Thank you again for taking the time to provide your feedback and we look forward to serving you again soon!

Sincerely,
Brian Palmer
Guest Services Manager
Courtyard by Marriott Pullman

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It was clean, plenty of parking, friendly staff
reviews.negatives:
No pool!
Jacuzzi broke!
Had to pay for Netflix!

reviews.title: Best Hotel Room I Have Ever Booked
reviews.text: We travel for business and this was the nicest room we had ever had the pleasure to stay in. Whenever we can get a good enough deal we stay here.  We will be repeat customers whenever we are in Pullman.  GORGEOUS room.  Feels like you are on vacation!!

reviews.title: Located right within WSU campus.  So convenient.
reviews.positives: Location. Bar tender was fantastic very friendly and a hard worker!!!!
reviews.negatives: Hotel was dirty in general;  the trashes on property were very full.

reviews.title: It was just okay. But we will not stay again. All other hotels in area better.
reviews.positives: Liked the hotel check in and the hotel employees were helpful.
reviews.negatives: The room was awkward. The fridge was a fridge where you had to push a button to keep on after a couple hours. The bathroom has no fan and no door so it gets wet, steamy and super slippery!! The bed was rough  but not the worst I've slept on. TV streaming was super slow and kept buffering the entire stay.

reviews.title: Irritated about the extra charges for parking particularly in a place like Pullman, WA, where space
reviews.positives: There was no breakfast so how can it be rated.  Room was clean and quiet.
reviews.negatives: The site says free breakfast and parking.  I was charged for both.  WiFi is only free if you sign up for a membership for Marriott Bonvoy.

reviews.title: Not what we booked
reviews.positives: The hotel was close to the campus. Food in the hotel bistro was fresh and tasty.
reviews.negatives:
I had booked a room with two queen beds.  They put me and my family in a room with one king bed and a sofa bed that was a twin size.  Now granted, it was just me and my son this trip, but if the rest of my family had come, the room would not fit us all.
When I asked about the room stating this was not what I booked, they said that sometimes the booking site gives them the wrong information and that I shouldn’t book through a third party….And the hotel was full due to the university tour day the next day so they couldn’t change rooms to the correct room.  They told me to contact Booking.com  and see if I can get my money back because “it’s not their fault”
I then said can we at least get sheets and covers for the twin.  They ended up bringing a fitted sheet, top sheet and a thin blanket.  No extra pillows and no comforter or duvet.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The facility was very clean but very small and definitely not worth $350 a night for two queen beds, no pool at the facility and the restaurant is overpriced and not well ran. I expected so much more for that price, I have paid much less and received much more
reviews.negatives: The price is absolutely ridiculous for what you get, the rooms literally look like motel 6

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I love the spacious layout of the king size room.
reviews.negatives: There is no breakfast or microwave in the room. Also I chose the property for its bar option and was told it was open only to find it closed early.

reviews.title: Nice & clean -
reviews.positives: It’s a great location, clean and nice. Pretty standard courtyard Marriott.
reviews.negatives: I reserved two queen beds, and upon check-in they gave me a King. When I showed them my reservation that said 2 queen, they said “oh sorry a king is all we have, we only clean the rooms we need”, and then she said “yeah it actually happens all the time.” What? This courtyard Marriott is the most expensive hotel in town, due to its good location. So I paid way more to go to this hotel than any other place - and they didn’t even honor the reservation? Super annoying. I’m returning again in August and we will be a party of 3, so I decided to stay elsewhere in hopes my reservation is honored and I’m paying less too.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: staff was friendly.
reviews.negatives: This modern motel is geared toward corporate need not travelers needs. Trying to save a few bucks by having to use your room card to keep power on while you are in it did not impress. the shower was not set up well. One small grab bar at the end opposite of where you stand under the shower head. The TV set up was not convenient so I didn't use it.

reviews.title: Average
reviews.positives: Location from the Pullman Moscow regional Airport. Shuttle service for the Airport early in the morning.
reviews.negatives: Poor Housekeeping service. We had to request every time for coffee, towels, cups etc. No microwave oven in room. Had difficulty with warming my toddler’s food and milk.

reviews.title: Ok but super expensive.
reviews.positives: the staff was super friendly and nice.
reviews.negatives: Rooms very small the pull-out couch/bed was terrible and super uncomfortable. Bathroom had weird stuff on the ceiling. Internet was terrible. Room temperature was very difficult to regulate.

reviews.title: Fancy, but not worth another stay
reviews.positives: I liked how fancy it was, and I liked how clean it was and I really liked the shower.
reviews.negatives: I don't like how the staff were disrespectful to me, and I don't like how the male hotel clerk kept misgendering me even though he saw my license said female. Also, it was ridiculous how I was charged another $113 to stay in the room, and how unpleasant the staff were.

reviews.title: Nice room but you have to pay for the breakfast in the smile that great. They didn't clean the rooms
reviews.positives: It was nice but you have to pay extra for the breakfast and they didn't clean the rooms for some reason we had to ask him even then they just didn't be the trash. Disappointing.
reviews.negatives: See above. Also they didn't have a microwave. This room is pretty expensive at least she have a microwave besides her refrigerator and clean up towels. And if you get trash daily.

reviews.title: Grad weekend.  Needed a break from grads!
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, housekeeping is always really nice, bar service was good
reviews.negatives: We arrived at 4:00 and our room wasn't ready.  We were not able to check in until after 6:00.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: the bed was hard

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The woman working the front desk was wonderful. She was friendly and informative. The facilities was very clean and quiet.
reviews.negatives: The hot tub was out of order and we were not made aware of this. This was one of our top reasons for staying here. Thankfully we were allowed to go across the parking lot to the hotel nearby with a hot tub.  The mini fridge did not keep all of our items cold.

reviews.title: Nice place, horrible mattress. Didn’t sleep well due to horrible mattress.
reviews.positives: Location easy to find
reviews.negatives: Bed mattress was horribly uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff was helpful in checking us in through the confirmation information I had received.
reviews.negatives: The reservation was lost, and so was the king room I had booked. It arrived late that night. Also, the lights didn't work unless the room key was plugged in to activate the lights.

reviews.title: Perfect for a weekend getaway!
reviews.positives: The staff, the location, the facilities, the room
reviews.negatives: The bed and the pillows were not that comfortable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Comfortable, clean, and quiet.
reviews.negatives: The front desk staff needs to be more friendly. They need to understand their job is about being friendly, welcoming guests, and making sure guests are appreciated.

reviews.title: Nice facility, questionable charges.
reviews.positives: Very comfortable rooms, very clean.
reviews.negatives: It was irritating to pay for parking.  I can understand charging for parking on game days, but it’s a ridiculous fee for a stay in Pullman, WA otherwise.  It’s not as if the cars are more protected there than they would be anywhere else.

reviews.title: pleasant, convenient, good food, clean.
reviews.positives: Lovely staff, lovely food from the bistro, nice sized rooms, comfortable.
reviews.negatives: No complaints.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff was great, and the room was clean and comfortable. Starbucks in lobby and a cafe with really good food options.
reviews.negatives: During our stay the entire gym was closed.  Our room faced the enormous hot tub; it was way too bright at night!!! I can't imagine sitting in there with the feeling of being on display for the entire half of the hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was great 👍 location fantastic and the bar had the game on.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast area was poorly staffed, had run out of everything and looked  busy/ dirty.  We had to leave , drive to get a bagel and coffee - that was a bummer.  Also v the outside furniture was very dirty. I had to change clothes after sitting on the outside couch.

reviews.title: Staff were welcoming, room was clean, bed was ok. It was all we needed for a quick, one night stay.
reviews.positives: Did not eat breakfast there, but bought coffee.
reviews.negatives: For the first time ever at a Marriott stay our bed was a little uncomfortable, it creaked and was harder than normal.

reviews.title: Great place to stay adjacent to WSU.
reviews.positives: Nice, modern.  Beautiful lobby with a tasty bistro.  Comfortable rooms.
reviews.negatives:
An add in the elevator and on the digital menu indicated a kids menu- but the server said they no longer provided kids menu.  Weird!

One night was super busy and they did not adequately staff the bistro.  There was no mechanism to track orders (numbers, buzzers, names) and my order was snatched by another guest when it was placed on the counter.  I had already been waiting a half hour!  They aimed to quickly make me another flatbread pizza, but it wasn’t the variety that had ordered.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The breakfast was good, but for what we paid for the room, it should have been included in room rate.  They did provide a shuttle to take us close to the football stadium.
reviews.negatives: Price!

reviews.title: Good location, and comfortable mattress. Although the front desk assistant could be more polite
reviews.positives: I thought my booking included breakfast at first, then it turned out my package didn't include the breakfast unless I paid for it. It's a little sad.
reviews.negatives: The front desk assistant wasn't very friendly and professional. He gave me the key card written 207 Room. After I tried several times and failed, I returned to the front desk, and he just simply said "oh I gave you the wrong number without any apology. It made me feel uncomfortable and definitely not a polite gesture.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Parking was limited and I wasn’t notified about the parking charge

reviews.title: great
reviews.positives:
Clean,
Modernized
Big
reviews.negatives: No complimentary breakfast

reviews.title: Clean, safe, conveniently located. Staff at bistro were wonderful.
reviews.positives: Location is attached to wsu. Convenient.
reviews.negatives: No free breakfast, front desk customer service lacked friendliness.

reviews.title: Nice clean hotel on the edge of town
reviews.positives: Clean spacious rooms that were quiet and comfy. Good filtration system indoors (it was smoky outside due to wildfires). Nice gym area with good treadmills and nice set of weights. 24/7 desk with a little market. Option for late checkout. Drop off/pickup point for bus to Spokane or Lewiston, ID.
reviews.negatives: Market could use some healthier options like fruit and yogurt. At least some orange juice in the cooler, please. Most of the options in the market were wine, beer, sugar sodas, candy, and microwave noodles. Not appetizing at all. That said, I appreciated that they at least had some postcards of the Palouse. Coffee maker in room was very cheap and coffee quality quite poor. A nespresso machine (or at least a Keurig) would have been better.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I liked the jacuzzi and the bar.
reviews.negatives: My room wasn't ready when I arrived and my microwave was not clean.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.positives: Clean and seemed new

reviews.title: Very clean hotel, super cozy, up to date enough! Lots of outside space and parking space! Comfy and clean!!
reviews.positives: I really loved this property! Clean, friendly, cozy !! Just wish they had continental breakfast for the price you pay!  But they do have a bistro to buy breakfast at!!
reviews.negatives: No pool only hot tub

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Clean
Friendly
Great location
Great fitness room

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.positives: The room was clean and bed was comfortable. The staff were friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: No complaints

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean, comfortable and quiet.

reviews.title: Wonderful facility, great staff!
reviews.positives: Clean and great location.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, but I would look at how you staff the cafe during busy weekends.  There was a long wait.

reviews.title: Attend wsu baseball games
reviews.positives: Staff were friendly,  courteous, professional and helpful

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Breakfast not bad.  Location great
reviews.negatives: Never came to clean the room and bathroom fan did not work

reviews.title: Loved our visit and see the value in returning to Pullman.
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: I would not say that I didn't like but more would be beneficial to deep clean the shower heads periodically. Pullman has hard water and shower heads tend to show you just that. The hard water will clog up the individual spray nozzles and redirect the spray pattern.

reviews.title: Very comfortable and stylish stay.
reviews.positives: Location is fantastic. The property is clean and very stylish as well as updated for tech meeds.  Staff is always friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Can’t say I found any faults.

reviews.title: Great Stay!! Will be back..
reviews.positives: Comfortable beds. Close to WSU and Palouse Ridge Golf Course.. Friendly Staff and a really good Fitness Centre. Pristine !!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing Staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very clean, very comfortable. They gave us breakfast coupons as well as free parking, too!

reviews.title: Thoroughly satisfied with the property and my stay.
reviews.positives: The room was modern, comfortable. The bed was comfortable and had adequate pillows (4). The flat screen was large and easy to use. The room had plenty of electrical receptacle with USB ports. The bathroom was modern and inviting.
reviews.negatives:
I couldn't find how to set the clock on the clock/radio/phone. Shower head needed cleaning, as it sprayed all over.
All very minor inconveniences.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Clean, friendly, easy access
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel that made the chaos of WSU freshman orientation a breeze!
reviews.positives: I loved that it was basically on campus!

reviews.title: Relaxing
reviews.positives: Beautiful room. Loved the bathroom. Great view.
reviews.negatives: Booked for 4 people but only enough towels for 3. Wish there was a pool.

reviews.title: Great location and comfortable beds.
reviews.positives: Convenient and close to my daughter’s place. Stayed on Sunday because it was affordable (meaning not graduation surgery pricing)
reviews.negatives: The shower floor was grimey and black. The rest of the room was spotless but the shower floor was gross. Minor considering how nice everything else was.

reviews.title: Excellent place to stay practically on the WSU campus
reviews.positives: Clean, large lobby, room was large and exceptionally clean. Bedding was excellent, including the mattress. Easy to reach 110v outlets and USB-A outlets on top of the nightstand.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Was great. Only boggle was the clock radio was set to the incorrect time and the buttons were broke so couldn’t fix it.

reviews.title: Our stay was fantastic
reviews.positives: Fantastic
reviews.negatives: I loved it

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean. Cougar spirit!
reviews.negatives: Waiting in line for breakfast. We had prepaid for breakfast but still had to wait with all the others that still needed to pay.  Short staffed in kitchen, food choices limited.

reviews.title: I am really impressed, and I am glad that Pullman has a place like this to stay at now.
reviews.positives: The staff was really nice. I can’t remember her name, but she works from like three to nighttime I guess. She was very helpful, and I really appreciate that she helped me out with a charger. She is really the only one that I interrupted with at the hotel, and I really want to give her a shout out.
reviews.negatives: There was actually nothing that I didn’t like. I wish that the little bistro had an hour or so during the lunchtime, but other than that, the day was great! Especially since it was a very last-minute reservation from a canceled flight.

reviews.title: Great place for families..
reviews.positives: Convenience - close the college swimming pool.
reviews.negatives: Only one staff was not very nice. But he also had  a late shift.

reviews.title: Relaxing, comfortable
reviews.positives: The room was cooled when I arrived, it smelled fresh, was super clean and had everything I needed to stay comfortably. Having food/coffee onsite is great and parking is ample. Staff is very friendly.
reviews.negatives: I chose this hotel specifically because it had an outdoor pool, but the water looked murky and nobody else was spending time in or around the pool so I didn’t go in. Not sure it would have even been refreshing since it was 100 outside.

reviews.title: Great trip!
reviews.positives: Very clean and very spacious
reviews.negatives: The shower concept was nice but not very practical

reviews.title: I'll be back!
reviews.positives: The hotel was very convenient for WSU events. When we arrived, we noticed how clean and modern the property was. Our room was spacious and had lots of storage to put everything away and keep it t out of site.
reviews.negatives: In the morning the wait for food was longer than I had expected due to staffing. Next time I will plan better for that possibility.

reviews.title: Very clean hotel and the staff were so friendly
reviews.positives: Close to campus and very comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Nothing I didn’t like

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: No hot water

reviews.title: Great hotel. Loved every part of our stay!
reviews.positives: Great amenities. The lounge area is inviting and modern. Nice to sit at the bar or fireplace. Nice staff. Everything you need is here!
reviews.negatives: Loved everything!

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.positives: Nice staff and very clean

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: clean, modern, comfortable bed. All staff friendly and helpful!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I loved the friendly and patient staff. The rooms were absolutely awesome. Clean and nice. Bathroom was spotless and elegant. Bar was not too expensive and food was amazing.Hotel lounge areas were great. Great outdoor patio with fire pits.
reviews.negatives: Pool is tiny.

reviews.title: Queja y pago
reviews.positives: Locación
reviews.negatives: Reservé una habitación con dos camas Queen a través de un tercero(book.com), tal como fue confirmado en la recepción al momento de mi llegada. Sin embargo, al hacer el check-in me asignaron una habitación con solo una cama Queen y un sofá cama, el cual no contaba con sábanas ni cobijas. Terminé durmiendo sobre un colchón sin ropa de cama, donde se sentían todos los resortes. Fue una experiencia sumamente incómoda y para nada acorde con lo que pagué.

reviews.title: Super nice
reviews.positives: Clean

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: موظفه الاستقبال وقحه للغاية

reviews.title: اقامه رائعة جداً ومنطقة جميلة
reviews.positives: فندق مريح .. نظيف  والأستقبال ممتازين جداً وخصوصاً الموظف محمد الظاهري  ونعم الرجل .
reviews.negatives: لا شيء

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location is fantastic. The service was substandard.
reviews.negatives: Maid service was nonexistent. The beds were not made nor were the towels replaced and there weren’t enough towels for our family. We had to request more, but they gave us an insufficient supply. There was no breakfast included.

reviews.title: Good stay, horrendous follow up in reversing double charge.  Still not reversed
reviews.positives: Amenities were great.  Problem only with being charged twice to my account.
reviews.negatives:
I was double charged for my stay.  Stay charged to my CAPITAL ONE AND MY VISA CREDIT CARD.  

5 phone calls, 2 emails and over 6 weeks later this has not been corrected.  Staff I have spoken to have been very polite.  The manager failed to call me back and then refused to speak with me.  Copies OF BOTH CHARGES have been sent.

reviews.title: Great place to stay on WSU campus.
reviews.positives: Room and location were great.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast burrito was cold.
